settings.heading: Let us be a part of your special event.
settings.subheading: From intimate dinners to 300-guest galas — for two decades, we've helped Chicago make memories with cake. Tell us what you're planning. We'll bake it.
settings.image_alt: Stephanie Hart and the Brown Sugar Bakery team styling an event dessert spread

settings.caption: Naked tier, gold leaf, fresh orchids
Valentine's spread at The Presidents Lounge
White tier, hand-piped, fresh red roses
Pink rosette buttercream — happy birthday, Ashley
Strawberries and candles for a milestone night

settings.heading: Diana Ross gets around.
settings.subheading: Caramel cake — our lead Supreme — has shown up at galas, weddings, corporate floors, fundraisers, milestone birthdays. We make memories with cake. — Stephanie

settings.title: Tell us about your date
settings.body: Two minutes. Pick a date, tell us the occasion, give us a guest count.

settings.title: I'll reach out within 48 hours
settings.body: I'll call or email — me, or someone from my team. Never a chatbot. We'll walk through your concept, your pricing, and your timeline. — Stephanie

settings.title: We bake. You enjoy your event.
settings.body: We confirm the design, deliver to your venue or arrange pickup, and you focus on your guests. That's the whole job.

settings.heading: Take the worry out of your event planning.
settings.subheading: Three steps. No surprises. We handle the rest.

settings.heading: Let me make this part easy.
settings.intro_quote: I plan dessert for 200+ events a year — weddings, corporate, milestone birthdays. Tell me what you're picturing and I'll come back with options for your budget within 24 hours.
settings.success_lede: Your inquiry is in. Here's what happens next.
settings.next_step_1: I'll review your inquiry personally and email you back.
settings.next_step_2: You'll get a custom quote with cake options for your budget, photos of comparable cakes, and a hold on your date if you want it.
settings.next_step_3: We confirm with a 50% deposit. The other 50% is due a week before pickup or delivery.
